name: Devkit-AI
description: Reusable skills, agents, and hooks for TypeScript development, installable into Claude Code, Cursor, or OpenCode.

plugins.name: typescript-rules
plugins.description: TypeScript coding conventions with automatic validation, review command, and reviewer agent
plugins.longDescription: TypeScript coding conventions with automatic validation, review command, and reviewer agent. Enforces interface extends over &, discriminated unions, no enums, no any, no default exports, and import type usage.

plugins.name: jsdoc-standards
plugins.description: JSDoc documentation standards with three enforcement levels (Minimal, Standard, Strict), automatic warnings, and on-demand review
plugins.longDescription: JSDoc documentation standards with three enforcement levels (Minimal, Standard, Strict), automatic warnings on missing docs, and on-demand review command.
